hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"$//'); PROJECT="C:/Users/phamp/OneDrive/Plocha/projekt"; if [[ "$FILE" == "$PROJECT"* || "$FILE" == *"OneDrive\\Plocha\\projekt"* ]]; then cd "$PROJECT" 2>/dev/null && if [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git add -A && git commit -m "auto: sync changes $(date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S)" && git push origin main; fi; fi 2>/dev/null || true
